pi_items.source: Task description specifies 'Width: 30 inches' and setup_task.sh generates poster content
Task description specifies 'Height: 20 inches' and setup_task.sh generates poster content
Task description requires deleting slides 2-5, leaving only slide 1
Found in Slide 1 title 'Urban Green Spaces and Community Well-being' from setup_task.sh lines 26-27
Found in Slide 2 body 'This study examines mental health outcomes in high-density districts.' from setup_task.sh line 28
Found in Slide 3 body 'We conducted a longitudinal survey of 500 residents.' from setup_task.sh line 29
Found in Slide 4 body 'Positive correlation coefficient (r=0.65) observed between park proximity and reported happiness.' from setup_task.sh line 30
Found in Slide 5 body 'Future policy implications include zoning for micro-parks.' from setup_task.sh line 31

privileged_info_summary: The task requires converting a 5-slide thesis presentation into a single academic poster with dimensions 30 inches by 20 inches. The presentation data is synthetic, generated by setup_task.sh using Python's odf.opendocument library. The starting presentation (thesis_draft.odp) contains 5 slides with the following verified content: Slide 1 includes 'Urban Green Spaces and Community Well-being' title; Slide 2 contains 'mental health outcomes' in the introduction; Slide 3 includes a 'longitudinal survey' of 500 residents; Slide 4 contains a positive 'correlation coefficient (r=0.65)'; and Slide 5 mentions 'policy implications' for micro-parks. The final output file must be saved as 'research_poster.odp' in the /home/ga/Documents/Presentations/ directory with exactly 1 slide and all required keywords preserved.
